title: XOAR (Xen-Orchestrated Appliance Repository) Architecture
description: A visual breakdown of the core components and data flow within the XOAR system, a tool for managing and deploying virtual appliances in a Xen-based cloud environment.
relationships: XOAR Server fetches appliance templates from the Template Store
XOAR Server orchestrates deployment to the XenServer Pool
XenServer Pool provisions the Virtual Appliance on a Hypervisor
